content_body: What an incredible stay at Above the Timberline from Dec 29 to Jan 2.  Absolutely beautiful cabin.  We had around ten adults which comprised of two families and there was plenty of room.  The cabin was decorated so cozy and the cleanliness was impeccable.  We love to cook and we could not believe all the amenities that were in the kitchen, including a large electric frying pan. Everything was so brand new.  The bedrooms were large and spacious, especially the king bedrooms.  We really enjoyed the big brick fireplace outside.  We watched football and played games. It snowed one night. We went into Blue Ridge---I enjoyed the olive oil tasting store, the old book store, the art stores and furniture stores.  We went up just a mile on Aska Road and hiked about 1/2 mile to the Stanley Mills waterfall.  What a fabulous walk.  We also went to the Mercier Orchards and tasted the apple and peach wines.  The Cabin Rentals of Georgia staff was extremely easy to work with and accommodating.  We are thinking about returning to the same place next year.  Once you go, you will want to return.  Next time, I would like to explore the hiking more, go on the train, maybe book a fishing trip or kayak trip.  Thank you to everyone who made our stay so wonderful.
title: Incredible Stay at Above the Timberline
